title: Ariadne CAD Patch v1
description: A declarative, idempotent batch of CAD mutations applied to a STAGED copy of a drawing. A patch is the unit the router applies transactionally-ish: an ordered list of operations (each an ariadne.autocad_sdk_job.v2-shaped action) with pre/postconditions that gate and verify the change. policy.staged_copy is REQUIRED true: the original-DWG safety invariant forbids patching an original/active drawing in place; patches always target staging/. additionalProperties true so callers may attach metadata.

patch_id.description: Stable id for this patch (used for idempotency and for naming derived diff/result artifacts).

source_agent.description: Agent/runtime that authored the patch (provenance, no secrets).

target_dwg.description: The STAGED drawing the patch mutates. staged_path must be a copy under staging/; original_path records the read-only source for provenance and is never written.

staged_path.description: Path to the staged copy that the patch operates on (writable). MUST be distinct from original_path.

original_path.description: Path to the read-only original the staged copy was made from. READ-ONLY; never written by a patch.

sha256_before.description: SHA-256 of the staged drawing before the patch (links to cad_diff.before_ref).

operations.description: Ordered list of mutations. Each item is a job-shaped action (operation + args) plus an optional per-op idempotency_key. Applied in array order; BUNDLE order is significant.

preconditions.description: Conditions that MUST hold before the patch is applied (e.g. entity_count == N, layer 'FOO' exists). If any fails the patch is not applied and the result is blocked.

postconditions.description: Conditions that MUST hold after the patch is applied to consider it successful (e.g. entity_count increased by K, handle H exists). Drives validation_report gates.

policy.description: Application policy. staged_copy MUST be true (original-DWG safety). dry_run plans without mutating.

staged_copy.description: Always true: patches apply only to staged copies, never to an original/active drawing in place.

write_mode.description: Effective write level for the staged target. write_copy is the safe default; write_original/live_edit require explicit authorization upstream.

atomic.description: When true and a sub-operation fails, the runner discards the staged result (no partial drawing kept).

idempotency_key.description: Top-level key making re-application of the whole patch safe.

step_id.description: Optional id for this step (for diff/validation traceability).

operation.description: Operation id resolvable in the operation registry (config/operations.v2.json). Same id space as cad_job.v2.operation.

condition.description: A checkable assertion over drawing state. subject names what is checked, op the comparison, value the expected value.

subject.description: What is asserted (e.g. entity_count, entity_count_by_type.LINE, layer_exists, handle_exists, block_count).

op.description: Comparison/operator. delta_* compares post-vs-pre (e.g. entity_count delta_eq +K).

value.description: Expected value/operand (number, string, bool) per subject/op.
